case_title: SAUL MOLINA VS. IRMA ELIZABETH SANDOVAL

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOLINA, SAUL AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, IRMA ELIZABETH
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-26-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, IRMA ELIZABETH

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BY PLAINTIFF. CASE SETTLED. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---ANGEL RODRIGUEZ. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---SAMUEL PEREZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $900.00 FILED BY MOLINA, SAUL AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, IRMA ELIZABETH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-09-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
